text:
Mark (マーク, Māku) is a personal assistant to Tserriednich Hui Guo Rou. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Chapter 345 

Appearance

Mark is a young man with slicked-back fair hair, with a strand falling to his forehead. He wears a luxurious tuxedo ensemble and a wristwatch. 

Personality

Not much is known about Mark's personality, but he has enough charisma to attract beautiful women to meet with Tserriednich. 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

Mark spots two girls in a nightclub and offers a meeting with Tserriednich in his luxurious hotel. Unfortunately, the girls do not meet Tserriednich's standards and he slaughters both of the women effortlessly and inhumanely. While taking a shower, Tserriednich contacted Mark and reprimanded him for sending women that aren't intellectual. Not to mention not even worthy of being called humans, since such girls he was presented with were barely above animals such as pigs or fish just waiting to be slaughtered by the likes of him and orders Mark to prepare the next two girls for him. So later Mark brings him two new girls.
